intent: Extend fluid sizing governance to file preview components and convert fixed visible dimensions there to responsive sizing.
assumptions: Thumbnail sizes can use rem-based media lengths.
Preview observer rootMargin remains a non-visual prefetch exception.
risks: Preview 3D transforms and PDF canvas sizing need type and browser checks.
Visual proof depends on current file data and logged-in app state.
steps: Implement preview scope in the sizing checker.
Convert preview fixed visible dimensions to rem/clamp.
Mark observer rootMargin as an explicit exception.
Run preview sizing check, tests, lint, build, and browser visual verification.
